# Variational Approximation


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

### [`Ptt`](https://SuzuSys.github.io/KalmanPaper/EKF/ekf.html#ptt): 推定誤差共分散行列 **P**<sub>*t*/*t*</sub>

$$\mathbf P\_{t/t}=\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}-\frac{\\2\lambda(\xi_t)\\^2}{1+\\2\lambda(\xi_t)\\^2\mathbf x_t^T\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}\mathbf x_t}\left(\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}\mathbf x_t\right)\left(\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}\mathbf x_t\right)^T$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/EKF.py#L20"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### Ptt

>  Ptt (Ptm:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'NN'], x:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'N'],
>           xi:jaxtyping.Float[Array,''])

<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>

<tr>
<td>Ptm</td>
<td>Float[Array, ‘N N’]</td>
<td><span
class="math inline"><strong>P</strong><sub><em>t</em>/<em>t</em> − 1</sub></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>x</td>
<td>Float[Array, ‘N’]</td>
<td><span
class="math inline"><strong>x</strong><sub><em>t</em></sub></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>xi</td>
<td>Float[Array, ’’]</td>
<td><span
class="math inline"><em>ξ</em><sub><em>t</em></sub></span></td>

<td><strong><span
class="math inline"><strong>P</strong><sub><em>t</em>/<em>t</em></sub></span></strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### [`wtt`](https://SuzuSys.github.io/KalmanPaper/EKF/ekf.html#wtt): 濾波推定値 $\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t}$

$$\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t}=\mathbf P\_{t/t}\left(\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}^{-1}\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t-1}+(y_t-1/2)\mathbf x_t\right)$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/EKF.py#L30"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

>  wtt (Ptm:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'NN'], Ptt_:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'NN'],
>           w:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'N'], x:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'N'],
>           y:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'N'])

### [`xipre`](https://SuzuSys.github.io/KalmanPaper/VA/va.html#xipre): $(\mathbf P\_{t/t-1},\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t-1})$ を使う変分パラメータ *ξ*<sub>*t*</sub>

$$\xi_t=\sqrt{\mathbf x_t^T\left(\mathbf P\_{t/t-1}+\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t-1}\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t-1}^T\right)\mathbf x_t}$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/VA.py#L35"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### [`VApre`](https://SuzuSys.github.io/KalmanPaper/VA/va.html#vapre): [`xipre`](https://SuzuSys.github.io/KalmanPaper/VA/va.html#xipre) を使う Variational Approximation

$$N,T,\\ \mathbf x_t \\\_{t=0,\ldots,T-1}, \\ y_t \\\_{t=0,\ldots,T-1}, \boldsymbol\Gamma, \hat{\mathbf w}\_{0/-1}, \mathbf P\_{0/-1} $$
$$\to\\\hat{\mathbf w}\_{t/t}\\\_{t=0,\ldots,T-1},\\\mathbf P\_{t/t}\\\_{t=0,\ldots,T-1},\\\xi_t\\\_{t=0,\ldots,T-1}$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/VA.py#L43"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
